assertion_results.text: Step 8 Case A creates standard remediation tasks for the current stream (rhtpa-2.2) with standard labels ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123'] and 'Depend' link to TC-8020
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md: 'Case A: Standard Remediation Tasks (current stream rhtpa-2.2)' with upstream backport task and downstream propagation subtask, both with labels: ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123"], and 'Create Depend link: TC-8020 -> <upstream-task-key>' and 'Create Depend link: TC-8020 -> <downstream-task-key>'

assertion_results.text: Step 8 Case B detects that stream rhtpa-2.1 is also affected but has no CVE Jira — creates proactive preemptive remediation tasks (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md: 'Case B: Proactive Preemptive Remediation (stream rhtpa-2.1): Cross-stream version impact analysis reveals that stream rhtpa-2.1 is also affected (tokio 1.40.0, threshold 1.42.0). A JQL search for sibling CVE Jiras with label CVE-2026-55123 in stream rhtpa-2.1 returns no results -- no CVE Jira exists for that stream. Per Step 8 Case B, create proactive preemptive remediation tasks for stream rhtpa-2.1.'

assertion_results.text: Preemptive tasks for stream rhtpa-2.1 include the 'security-preemptive' label alongside standard labels: ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123', 'security-preemptive']
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md: 'Labels: ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123", "security-preemptive"]' for both preemptive upstream backport task and preemptive downstream propagation subtask.

assertion_results.text: Preemptive tasks are linked to the originating CVE Jira TC-8020 with 'Related' link type (not 'Depend') because the originating CVE belongs to a different stream
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md: 'Create Related link (not Depend): TC-8020 <-> <preemptive-upstream-task-key>' and 'Create Related link: TC-8020 <-> <preemptive-downstream-task-key>'. cross-stream.md: 'Link type: Related (not Depend) to the originating CVE Jira TC-8020 -- Because the originating CVE belongs to a different stream (rhtpa-2.2)'

assertion_results.text: Preemptive task descriptions include a preemptive remediation prefix noting TC-8020 (stream rhtpa-2.2) as the originating CVE
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md: Both preemptive task descriptions begin with '> **Preemptive remediation**: This task was created proactively from cross-stream > impact analysis of TC-8020 (stream rhtpa-2.2). > No stream-specific CVE Jira exists yet for this stream. When PSIRT creates one, > this task will be linked and the security-preemptive label removed.'
